title: Sized: The Size-Challenge
description: Minecraft, but everytime you destroy a block/kill an entity you'll grow!
body:
# SiZed: The Minecraft Size-Challenge

Play Minecraft like never before! With the SiZed challenge you grow every time you destroy a block or kill an entity. Very basic, but worth a try!

## Prerequisites
**Note:** You need the Pehkui mod to play SiZed!

### Download it here:
**Curseforge:** [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui)

**Modrinth:** [https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)

*Make sure you install the newest version of the Minecraft Java 1.20.1!*

 

![SiZed Logo Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21c31d7c500cd90e0c26978ff2c9cfd1615fec06.png)
